what: Submit knowledge entry creation request to the backend
why: Persist the new knowledge entry by validating, writing to the vault, auditing content quality, and indexing for search

success_handling.criteria: Backend confirms the entry is written, audited, and indexed — SSE completed event received

error_handling.description: Show error that the knowledge entry failed server-side validation
Show error that writing the entry to the vault failed
Show error that the backend is unreachable
